title: Goa nightclub fire: Sessions court grants bail to club's managers; all accused now out on bail
description: A sessions court in Goa granted bail to Rajiv Modak and Bijay Kumar Singh, managers of Birch by Romeo Lane nightclub in North Goa’s Arpora where a fire in December 2025 had killed 25 people. This follows an earlier order of April 1 granting bail to nightclub owners Saurabh and Gaurav Luthra. With this development, every key accused named in the case has secured bail. One of the accused remains absconding. The Luthra brothers were granted bail on a bond of ₹50,000 each, subject to conditions
